evaluations.message: Log4Shell Remote Code Execution (CVE-2021-44228) — CISA KEV confirmed, N4 adverse impact, LEV, IRV

remediation.summary: Upgrade log4j to 2.15.0 or later. Apply vendor patch immediately. Finding is on the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog — exploitation in the wild confirmed.

findings.title: Log4Shell Remote Code Execution
findings.description: JNDI injection via log4j allows unauthenticated remote code execution. CVE-2021-44228. EPSS: 0.9754. CISA KEV: Yes.
